mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC')

SELECT A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.UP_DSCS_ATCL_ID , NVL(A.ATCL_LV, 0) AS ATCL_LV , NVL(A.ATCL_SEQNO, 0) AS ATCL_SEQNO , A.DSCS_ATCL_TYCD , A.OKNOK_GBNCD , A.ATCL_TTL , A.ATCL_CTS , A.ATCL_CTS_LEN , NVL(A.INQ_CNT, 0) AS INQ_CNT , U.USERNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.EDTR_USEYN , A.DELYN , A.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{dscsAtclId}

SELECT DSCS_ATCL_ID , DSCS_ID , UP_DSCS_ATCL_ID , NVL(ATCL_LV, 0) AS ATCL_LV , NVL(ATCL_SEQNO, 0) AS ATCL_SEQNO , DSCS_ATCL_TYCD , OKNOK_GBNCD , ATCL_TTL , ATCL_CTS , ATCL_CTS_LEN , INQ_CNT , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , EDTR_USEYN , DELYN , USER_ID , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N') AS cmntCount FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId} AND (A.DELYN = 'N' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C WHERE C.DSCS_ATCL_ID = A.DSCS_ATCL_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' )) ORDER BY A.ATCL_SEQNO ASC, A.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.REG_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO, A.DSCS_ID, A.DSCS_TTL, C.SBJCTNM, C.DVCLAS_NO, B.RGTR_ID, U.USERNM, B.ATCL_TTL AS ttl, CHR(10) || B.ATCL_CTS || CHR(10) AS cts, B.ATCL_CTS_LEN, B.REG_DTTM, B.MOD_DTTM, ( SELECT LISTAGG(F.FILENM, CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY F.FILENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL F WHERE F.ATFL_REPO_ID = 'FORUM' AND F.ATCL_ID = B.DSCS_ATCL_ID ) AS filenm FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USR U ON U.USER_ID = B.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{dscsId}
